title: Vera Bradley Stock Forecast and Price Targets
text: Small Cap Consumer Research set a price target of $5.50 for Vera Bradley stock. Various analysts provide price targets for VRA, with some projecting $4.00 representing a 52.38% increase from the current stock price of $2.63 at the time of analysis. Two analysts provided short-term price targets with an average of $6.50, with forecasts ranging from $6.00 to $7.00. This represents approximately 46.73% upside from the last closing price of $4.43. The average analyst rating for Vera Bradley stock is 'Buy,' indicating analysts believe this stock is likely to outperform the market over the next twelve months.
